section: H2:Privacy Policy
sentence: Last updated: December 13, 2024

section: H2:Privacy Policy
sentence: This Privacy Policy sets forth how Fourtages (“we,” “us,” or “our”) collects, uses, and discloses your personal information when you interact with our websites, applications, or other services (collectively, the “Service”). By choosing to use our Service, you acknowledge and agree to the collection and handling of information as described below. This document also informs you of your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

section: H2:Privacy Policy
sentence: We process your data to provide and improve the Service. Your continued use of the Service implies your acceptance of the terms in this Privacy Policy, which covers all Fourtages products and platforms.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Interpretation
sentence: Words with capitalized initial letters have meanings defined in the following sections. These definitions apply equally whether such terms appear in singular or plural forms.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Account means a unique profile you create to access or use parts of our Service, enabling additional features or personalized settings.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Company (referred to as “the Company,” “We,” “Us,” or “Our” in this Policy) refers to Fourtages.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Cookies are small text files placed on your computer or mobile device by a website, storing details of your browsing history and other relevant data.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Country refers to Ukraine.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Device means any apparatus used to access the Service, such as a computer, smartphone, or tablet.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Personal Data is any information related to an identified or identifiable individual.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Service refers to the websites, applications, or other platforms provided by Fourtages.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Service Provider means any legal or natural person who processes data on behalf of the Company, helping to provide or improve the Service, or conducting data analysis.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Third-party Social Media Service refers to any external social network or website that allows users to log in or create an account for our Service.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Usage Data means data automatically collected through the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself, such as the duration of a page visit.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: Website refers to the main online site for Fourtages or any related subdomain.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Interpretation and Definitions > H4:Definitions
sentence: For the purposes of this Privacy Policy: You refers to the individual accessing our Service, or the company or legal entity on behalf of which such person is acting.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Types of Data Collected
sentence: While using the Service, you may be asked to provide certain personally identifiable information, such as name, email address, phone number, and mailing address. We may also automatically collect Usage Data including your Device’s IP address, browser type, visited pages, and time spent on those pages.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Data Sharing
sentence: We may share your information with third-party service providers—like Firebase, Google Services, or Google Analytics— for purposes such as analytics or operational enhancements. They process your data according to their own privacy policies. Please review those to understand how they handle your information.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Personal Data
sentence: Personal Data may include, but is not limited to: Email address

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Personal Data
sentence: Personal Data may include, but is not limited to: First and last name

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Personal Data
sentence: Personal Data may include, but is not limited to: Phone number

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Personal Data
sentence: Personal Data may include, but is not limited to: Mailing address (including ZIP/Postal code, State, Province, and City)

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Personal Data
sentence: Personal Data may include, but is not limited to: Usage Data

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Usage Data
sentence: Usage Data is collected automatically and may include data such as your IP address, browser version, the pages you visit, the time and date of your visit, and unique device identifiers. When accessing the Service via mobile, we may also gather device-specific information including OS type, mobile browser, and diagnostic logs.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Information from Third-Party Social Media Services
sentence: You have the option to create an account or log in using services like Google, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, or LinkedIn. If you link such accounts, we may collect data already associated with them. Any additional information you choose to share is processed in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Tracking Technologies and Cookies
sentence: We use Cookies and similar tracking technologies (like beacons or tags) to monitor activity and store certain information. These help improve our Service by remembering user preferences and analyzing engagement.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Collecting and Using Your Personal Data > H4:Tracking Technologies and Cookies
sentence: Cookies can be “Persistent” or “Session.” Persistent Cookies remain on your Device even after you go offline, while Session Cookies are deleted once you close your browser. You can configure your browser to refuse Cookies or alert you when Cookies are being sent; however, declining them may limit some features of the Service.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Android API
sentence: Our application may integrate Android APIs to enable particular functionalities, like approximate location or device performance checks. We only access the minimum data required to deliver these features and do not share it externally without your explicit permission. You can control or revoke such data access in your device settings.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Service Provision and Maintenance: Monitoring usage to ensure stability and enhance user experience.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Account Management: Providing individualized features for registered users.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Contract Fulfillment: Handling transactions or agreements established through the Service.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Communications: Sending email, calls, or push notifications regarding updates, products, or services you request.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: News and Offers: Delivering relevant info about new products, services, or promotions, unless you opt out.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Request Handling: Addressing any inquiries, concerns, or requests you submit.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Business Transitions: Evaluating or conducting mergers, asset sales, or reorganizations where user data may be part of the assets transferred.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: Fourtages may use your Personal Data for various purposes, including: Analytics and Improvements: Identifying usage trends, refining marketing campaigns, and upgrading our Service’s functionality.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: We may share Personal Data under specific conditions: Service Providers: Engaging external parties to analyze or facilitate the Service.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: We may share Personal Data under specific conditions: Business Transfers: During negotiations for or execution of mergers, financing, or partial sales.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: We may share Personal Data under specific conditions: With Other Users: If you interact publicly (e.g., in forums), certain data may be visible to others.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Use of Your Personal Data
sentence: We may share Personal Data under specific conditions: With Your Consent: Where you explicitly authorize the distribution of your Personal Data.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Retention of Your Personal Data
sentence: We retain your data only as long as necessary for the purposes in this Policy or to fulfill legal obligations. Usage Data is generally kept for a shorter period unless required to strengthen security or improve functionality.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Transfer of Your Personal Data
sentence: Information you provide may be processed outside your region under differing data protection laws. By agreeing to this Policy, you consent to such transfers, ensuring we adopt suitable safeguards for your Personal Data.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Delete Your Personal Data
sentence: You can request deletion of your Personal Data at any time. Follow the instructions in our Deletion Request or contact us directly. We will remove your information from active systems unless legally required to keep it longer.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Business Transactions
sentence: If Fourtages is involved in a merger or asset sale, your data may be transferred. We will notify you of any changes in policy after such transactions.

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Law Enforcement
sentence: Under certain circumstances, we may disclose your Personal Data if compelled by law or pursuant to legitimate requests from public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency).

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Other Legal Requirements
sentence: We may also disclose data in good faith when necessary to: Comply with legal obligations

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Other Legal Requirements
sentence: We may also disclose data in good faith when necessary to: Protect Fourtages’ property or rights

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Other Legal Requirements
sentence: We may also disclose data in good faith when necessary to: Prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing connected with the Service

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Other Legal Requirements
sentence: We may also disclose data in good faith when necessary to: Safeguard the safety of users or the public

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Disclosure of Your Personal Data > H4:Other Legal Requirements
sentence: We may also disclose data in good faith when necessary to: Mitigate potential legal liabilities

section: H2:Privacy Policy > H3:Security of Your Personal Data
sentence: We adopt commercially appropriate means to protect your Personal Data, but no method of online transmission or electronic storage is entirely secure. While we endeavor to keep your data safe, absolute security cannot be guaranteed.

section: H2:Children’s Privacy
sentence: Our Service is not directed at children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect data from them. If you learn that a child has provided us with Personal Data without parental consent, please notify us. We will remove that data immediately, complying with relevant local laws.

section: H2:Disclaimer for Transitioning to Third-Party Resources
sentence: This Service may link to external sites not controlled by us. We advise reviewing the privacy policies of any external resource. We are not accountable for practices or content outside our domains.

section: H2:Changes to this Privacy Policy
sentence: We may update this Policy occasionally to reflect new practices or legal obligations. Substantial changes could result in an email notification or prominent alert within the Service. The “Last updated” date indicates the latest revisions. Continuing to use our Service after modifications implies acceptance of the updated terms.

section: H2:Contact Us
sentence: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
